text.title: Change Control Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the change-control methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: written_cr_only
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Every change must have a written Change Request before work begins; verbal agreement is forbidden.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `written-cr-only` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: impact_analysis_required
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: CR must include impact analysis across scope, schedule, cost, quality, and risk before CCB review.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `impact-analysis-required` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: baseline_update_on_approval
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: On CR approval, baseline must be updated and re-published; un-updated baselines cause drift.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `baseline-update-on-approval` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: decision_log_immutable
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: CR decisions (approved/rejected/deferred) must be logged with date, decider, rationale — never edited.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `decision-log-immutable` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: ccb_quorum_required
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: CCB decisions must meet quorum (≥3 voting members including Sponsor delegate) — single-person approvals invalid.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `ccb-quorum-required` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-change-control.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
